task_name: Add Live Builder Adapter Readiness Hard Block Fixtures
goal: Add local block fixtures for Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate dangerous flags without changing runtime behavior or enabling live Builder, task creation, execution, auth, secrets, persistence, or approval recording.
claims: BP-079 adds hard-block fixtures for adapter mode, task create effect, execute effect, and live builder allowed flag.
BP-079 keeps all blocked outputs local with network_effect, task_create_effect, and execute_effect set to none.
BP-079 does not change Live Builder Adapter Readiness Candidate runtime behavior.
assumptions: BP-077 requires local hard-block fixtures before any live-adapter work.
The existing candidate already blocks these dangerous flags.
Fixture expansion can be done without runtime or review-suite changes.
dod: Block fixtures exist for adapter mode, task create effect, execute effect, and live builder allowed flag.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, Builder Task Create, auth, secrets, persistence, approval recording, DB, deploy, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-078 added missing-required-fields and CLI error hardening; BP-077 also requires dangerous-flag block fixtures before live-adapter work.
